applicability_notes: constraints: {'broadcast': 'shapes must be broadcastable', 'accuracy': 'ulp_threshold=1 for bfloat16; rtol=1e-05, atol=1e-05 for float32'}; fusion_notes: Binary elementwise op; replaces unoptimized torch chain sqrt(square(a) + square(b)) when encountered, per torch.hypot semantics. Eligible for unary activation post-op fusion as a binary eltwise op.
